message:
fix(daemon): add socket cleanup and server.Stop() to panic recovery (bd-23)

The panic recovery defer in runDaemonLoop only removed the PID file,
leaving the Unix socket file on disk after a crash. This caused
confusing "socket in use" errors on subsequent daemon starts.

Fix: hoist server and socketPath declarations before the panic recovery
defer so the closure can access them, then call server.Stop() with a
5-second timeout guard and explicitly remove the socket file as a
fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
